title: Anagram Partners promotes 5 lawyers to Partnership
description: Anagram Partners has announced the promotion of five lawyers to Partnership.The newly appointed Partners are:Aashna Kothari | MumbaiKaran Nelivigi | MumbaiKeegan Pavrey | MumbaiSarthak Parnami | New DelhiShwetank Chaubey | MumbaiOn these promotions, the firm shared in a press release:"They have been integral to several of the Firm’s key mandates and have contributed meaningfully to client relationships, team development and the Firm’s growth.We congratulate them on this well-deserved milestone."
